member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no
,sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ,sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no_back ,sc_mem_m_member_address.mooban ,sc_mem_m_member_address.moo ,sc_mem_m_member_address.road ,sc_mem_m_member_address.soi ,sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol ,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as district_name ,sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as province_name ,sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode ,sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_member_address where sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' /*ปัจจุบัน*/ and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no is not null --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coop_position in ( '24','26','27','28','29' ) ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '016006' and '016006' ) --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '060283' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
